MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: This is the mapping for WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER
MAPPING.NAME: M_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MEMBER_ID, SHORT_DESCR, LONG_DESCR, MEMBER_CLASS, MAX(VALID_FROM_DATE) as VALID_FROM_DATE FROM ( SELECT LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_ID as MEMBER_ID, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_SHORT_DESCR as SHORT_DESCR, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_LONG_DESCR as LONG_DESCR, 'Cost Pool' as MEMBER_CLASS, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_EFF_STRT_TS as VALID_FROM_DATE FROM LH_COSTCENTER_INTG WHERE CHG_FLG = 'Y' UNION SELECT LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.BUS_AREA || '-' || 'HPE' as MEMBER_ID, '' as SHORT_DESCR, '' as LONG_DESCR, 'Business Area' as MEMBER_CLASS, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_EFF_STRT_TS as VALID_FROM_DATE FROM LH_COSTCENTER_INTG WHERE CHG_FLG = 'Y' )A GROUP BY MEMBER_ID, SHORT_DESCR, LONG_DESCR, MEMBER_CLASS ORDER BY MEMBER_CLASS, MEMBER_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_EFF_STRT_TS, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.NM, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.DN, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_INCTV_IND, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_ACN_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.ACCT_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.MRU_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.FNCTL_AR_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.PFT_CNTR_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.LGL_CTRY_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CST_CNTR_TYPE, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.CO_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.MAS_CD, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_ID, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_SHORT_DESCR, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.COST_POOL_LONG_DESCR, LH_COSTCENTER_INTG.BUS_AREA FROM LH_COSTCENTER_INTG WHERE CHG_FLG = 'Y'

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This targets runs an UPDATE script to unmark the updated records at INTEGRATION layer
INSTANCE.NAME: LH_COSTCENTER_INTG_flag_update

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: UPDATE LH_COSTCENTER_INTG SET CHG_FLG = 'N' WHERE CHG_FLG = 'Y'

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This targets runs an UPDATE script to unmark the updated records at CORE layer
INSTANCE.NAME: CST_CNTR_flag_update

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: UPDATE CST_CNTR SET CHG_FLG = 'N' WHERE CHG_FLG = 'Y'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: These workflows are created from the Workflow Generation Wizard.
WORKFLOW.NAME: WF_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This is the session for the mapping M_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER
SESSION.NAME: S_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER

Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This is the session for the mapping M_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: S_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $S_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $S_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $S_POL_WKD_FILE_COSTCENTER.ErrorMsg
